headline: Eli Lilly Obesity Wins Recast Retatrutide And Foundayo As Cardiometabolic Story
summary: Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY) reported Phase 3 results for obesity drugs retatrutide and Foundayo at the American Diabetes Association 86th Scientific Sessions in 2026. The data show strong weight loss outcomes and benefits in related conditions such as sleep apnea, knee osteoarthritis pain, and type 2 diabetes. The trials include at-risk groups, including women at different life stages and patients with multiple metabolic conditions. Eli Lilly is already widely followed for its work in diabetes and...
